articles.title: Charles Hoskinson Says Cardano ‘Isn’t Dying,’ Offers Reasons Why Sentiment Around the Crypto Project Is Negative
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) co-creator Charles Hoskinson is dispelling rumors that the Ethereum (ETH) competitor is a dying blockchain. In a new thread on the social media platform X, the Input Output Hong Kong (IOHK) CEO says that the negative sentiment surrounding Cardano has to do with its governance protocol not scaling to meet its needs, an […]

articles.title: Four Reasons Ether ETFs Have Underperformed
articles.description: ETH ETFs haven't gained the same traction as BTC ETFs, even seeing net outflows this week. Tom Carreras investigates why.

articles.title: TradFi Giant Stripe Announces Support for Crypto Payments On Solana
articles.description: Stripe, one of the world’s biggest payment providers, has reintroduced stablecoin payments for U. S. merchants.

articles.title: Tether CEO Open to Big Four Audit in Transparency Drive
articles.description: As questions persist over Tether's reserves, CEO Paolo Ardoino says he's ready for a Big Four audit to settle the debate.

articles.title: 'Cardano Isn't Dying, It's Thriving and Growing': Charles Hoskinson
articles.description: Hoskinson explains why Cardano is loathed by others in crypto space

articles.title: Trump-linked World Liberty Financial to raise $300 million at $1.5 billion valuation: Roadmap
articles.description: After the WLFI tokens are launched, they will be non-transferable for the first 12 months but can be used for voting.

articles.title: Solana’s $USDC and $USDP Stablecoins Now Accepted by Stripe
articles.description: This is a big deal because it opens the door for more people to use cryptocurrency when buying things online. This option makes stablecoins a safer choice for shopping. articles.title: Ethereum Price Drops as Chinese Government Kickstarts Sales for $1.3B Worth of ETH Seized from PlusToken Scam
articles.description: Coinspeaker Ethereum Price Drops as Chinese Government Kickstarts Sales for $1.3B Worth of ETH Seized from PlusToken Scam The Ethereum market has faced immense selling pressure in the recent past emanating from whale selling led by the US spot Ether ETF issuers. articles.title: Shiba Inu Whales Fuel Major Sell-Off
articles.description: Shiba Inu whales doubled their trading volume, raising concerns that they may be behind the recent sell-off as SHIB struggles to stabilize.

articles.title: Optimism rolls out fifth airdrop, allocates 10.3 million OP tokens to 54,000 Superchain users
articles.description: Optimism launched its fifth airdrop, distributing 10.3 million OP tokens (worth $16 million) to 54,700 user addresses.
